Experts.description: Recurring documentary experts used across the documentary.

DisplayName.description: Short on-screen name for the expert.

Role.description: Why this expert is relevant to the topic.

VoiceName.description: Chosen ElevenLabs voice name for this expert.

VoiceId.description: Chosen ElevenLabs voice ID for this expert.

CharacterSheetPrompt.description: Prompt for a production-style expert model sheet that combines turnaround views and facial expression panels in one reference image. Include front, three-quarter, profile, and back views, plus expression closeups, with no text.

PortraitPrompt.description: Prompt for a single canonical expert portrait in the shared interview environment, suitable as the talking-head anchor image.
